question: What is the main feature of the image? Select from the following options: (A) Stairs and a wooden desk.. (B) Glass walls and windows in a room.. (C) A modern living room with a TV.. (D) An office room with a chair and a desk..
gold_answer: Glass walls and windows in a room
answer_choices: Glass walls and windows in a room
